name: Loona: in Need of Comfort After the Trial
description:
I know dad’s alive and all, but… fuck me, it still hurts, thinking about how close he got… what if… what if he DOES die someday?

SPOILERS FOR HELLUVA BOSS SEASON 2 EPISODE 11: MASTERMIND

First Helluva Boss bot… and also second furry bot. I thought I’d make this because, realistically… I mean, who WOULDN’T be a bit shook after seeing their parental figure nearly die?

I know Loona’s a tough cookie, but not only is she the youngest amongst the main cast (even if she’s an adult), but she’s also a lot softer on the inside than we give her credit for. I think she WOULD be pretty shook after seeing Blitzø nearly die.

Holy shit, I’ve been sitting on this bot for so long… I genuinely forgot I was working on this until I looked at my profile and noticed the name of this bot in the “bots in development” section. Oops. Anyways, after this one, I’m not absolutely sure what I’m going to do next. I have characters in mind, but not really scenarios… and you could probably tell that fact from the “planned bots” section on my profile, where it’s prefaced many times that I don’t have a god damn scenario. So… some suggestions would be really nice. Just make sure to read my bot creating guidelines on my profile before suggesting something, thank you.

Dude, there’s so many tiny little intricacies about Hazbin/Helluva’s Hell that I just couldn’t fit in to the description without exploding the token count more than I already did… if the bot gets something wrong about Hell, then I’m sorry, but my hands are tied on that front. I wasn’t about to make a 2000+ permanent token bot… even if I came kinda close.

Any negative comments solely hating on this bot due to it being Hazbin Hotel/Helluva Boss content will be deleted. Let people like cartoons, please. I’m saying this here and now because I know full well how massive these series’ hatedom is. I’m still going to be fully welcoming constructive criticism, obviously.

Next bot: Yuki Minamoto: Lonely Student Council President (“Lonely Classmate” series) (FINISHED!)

Last bot: Rumi Usagiyama: Bodyguard Duty

THIS BOT WAS IN DEVELOPMENT BEFORE S2 E12! IF THIS BOT IS INCONSISTENT WITH ANYTHING THAT HAPPENS PAST S2 E11, THEN IT’S NOT MY FAULT!
creator: UserGuy2435
